label: Day 9 — Afternoon: YouthPass Ceremony & Departures
description: The YouthPass ceremony and departures. A brief, warm, dignified moment of recognition before participants head to the airport. Simple, human, memorable.
objectives: Formally recognise each participant's learning journey
Create a lasting final memory of the exchange
Ensure smooth and stress-free departure logistics

steps.title: YouthPass Ceremony
steps.body: Each participant receives their YouthPass certificate. Facilitators say one personal word for each participant as they collect it. Group photo. Brief closing words from group leaders.

steps.title: Final group photo & goodbyes
steps.body: Informal time for last hugs, photo exchanges, contact sharing. No rush.

steps.title: Departures
steps.body: Transfer to airport/station in coordinated groups. Facilitators available until the last participant departs.

facilitatorNote: Keep the ceremony short and personal — quality over length. The personal word for each participant (even just one sentence) makes all the difference. Prepare these in advance: you will not be in the right headspace to improvise on the last day.
